vocab.meaning: khuynh hướng thích ở một mình
vocab.example: Having a solitary disposition as a child, I often found comfort in drawing and reading rather than playing in loud groups.

vocab.meaning: các hoạt động/sáng kiến do bạn bè tự dẫn dắt
vocab.example: I thoroughly enjoyed participating in peer-led initiatives, like building a neighborhood treehouse with the kids next door.

vocab.meaning: thích thú với sự tự chủ/tự quyết
vocab.example: I tended to relish the autonomy of individual play, as it allowed me to set my own rules without any compromise.

vocab.meaning: giao lưu một cách ngắt quãng/không liên tục
vocab.example: I used to socialize in fits and starts; I would play with a large group for an hour but then need several hours of quiet time.

vocab.meaning: phát triển/hào hứng nhờ năng lượng tập thể
vocab.example: Being an extroverted child, I would thrive on collective energy during team sports or large family gatherings.
Participating in the school choir instilled a sense of group cohesion that I found incredibly motivating.

vocab.meaning: những thú vui/theo đuổi cá nhân (một mình)
vocab.example: My childhood was characterized by solitary pursuits, such as building complex scale models in my bedroom.

vocab.meaning: xử lý/vận hành các mối quan hệ xã hội
vocab.example: Playing in large groups taught me how to negotiate social dynamics and handle disagreements from a very young age.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: I preferred working alone on puzzles because it required uninterrupted focus that group settings often disrupted.

vocab.meaning: một nỗ lực/hoạt động chung của cộng đồng
vocab.example: We viewed building a backyard bonfire as a communal endeavor where every child had a specific role to play.
